tests.scenario: Open support chat directly from the home screen
steps: Launch the app and wait for the home screen
Tap the visible primary support action once
tests.expected_result: An active chat input opens within 3 seconds and no additional navigation step is required.
tests.notes: Refined from the automated test to match the hybrid requirement's one-tap entry condition.

tests.scenario: Keep chat entry to a single tap from the home screen
steps: Launch the app and remain on the home screen
Count the taps needed to reach an active support chat input
tests.expected_result: The user reaches an active chat input in no more than one tap and no intermediate screen is required.
tests.notes: Added to verify the one-tap navigation constraint separately from the timing condition.

tests.scenario: Acknowledge an emotional disclosure without judgment
steps: Open an active support conversation
Send a message describing loneliness or overwhelm
tests.expected_result: The first system reply acknowledges the emotional state and does not contain blaming, mocking, or dismissive language.
tests.notes: Clarified the expected result so it is directly traceable to the hybrid support requirement.

tests.scenario: Acknowledge stress before suggesting the next step
steps: Open an active support conversation
Send a message describing stress or overwhelm
Inspect the first system reply before any follow-up reply appears
tests.expected_result: The first reply acknowledges the user's emotional state before suggesting any exercise, action, or next step.
tests.notes: Added to verify the ordering requirement in the hybrid support response.

tests.scenario: Show separate entries for core coping tools
steps: Open the self-help tools area
Inspect the list of available tools
tests.expected_result: Breathing, grounding, journaling, and meditation appear as separate selectable entries.
tests.notes: Updated from the automated tools test to verify the revised hybrid categories.

tests.scenario: Keep core coping tools as distinct selectable entries after reopening the tools area
steps: Open the self-help tools area
Leave the tools area and reopen it
Inspect the list of available tools again
tests.expected_result: Breathing, grounding, journaling, and meditation still appear as separate selectable entries after reopening the tools area.
tests.notes: Added to verify that the structured tool layout persists across repeated access.

tests.scenario: Match an exercise recommendation to the stated issue
steps: Open a support conversation
Describe a specific issue and request a coping exercise
Request another recommendation only if needed
tests.expected_result: The recommendation references the user's stated issue and is not identical to the immediately previous recommendation unless the user asks for repetition.
tests.notes: Added to verify that the hybrid revision addresses repetitive or mismatched exercise suggestions.

tests.scenario: Avoid repeating the same exercise recommendation across consecutive requests
steps: Open a support conversation
Describe a specific issue and request a coping exercise
Request another exercise without asking for repetition
tests.expected_result: The second recommendation is not identical to the immediately previous recommendation and remains relevant to the user's stated issue.
tests.notes: Added to test the anti-repetition part of the hybrid exercise requirement.

tests.scenario: Reply using the latest user topic
steps: Open a support conversation
Send a message containing a specific event or feeling
tests.expected_result: The reply includes at least one matching topic, event, or feeling from the user's immediately preceding message.
tests.notes: Rewritten from the automated conversation-quality test to check topical relevance explicitly.

tests.scenario: Reply using the latest feeling expressed by the user
steps: Open a support conversation
Send a message describing a specific feeling such as guilt, loneliness, or anxiety
tests.expected_result: The reply includes at least one matching feeling from the user's immediately preceding message.
tests.notes: Added to verify the feeling-matching branch of the response relevance requirement.

tests.scenario: Continue the same topic after several turns
steps: Open a support conversation
Exchange at least six turns on one topic
Ask a follow-up question about that same topic
tests.expected_result: The system continues the same topic without restarting from a generic introduction.
tests.notes: Updated to align with the hybrid requirement's context-retention expectation.

tests.scenario: Preserve context across up to ten turns in one session
steps: Open a support conversation
Exchange ten consecutive turns about one topic
Ask a follow-up question about information mentioned earlier in the same session
tests.expected_result: The system continues the same topic and reflects earlier information instead of resetting to a generic introduction.
tests.notes: Added to verify the explicit ten-turn context-retention threshold.

tests.scenario: Label free and paid sections on the pricing screen
steps: Open the pricing screen
Review the pricing layout before any checkout action
tests.expected_result: The interface shows one labeled free section and one labeled paid section before any checkout or subscription confirmation step.
tests.notes: Refined from the automated pricing test to verify the revised hybrid labeling rule.

tests.scenario: Show tier labels before any purchase confirmation step
steps: Open the pricing screen
Inspect the screen before selecting any checkout or subscription confirmation action
tests.expected_result: One labeled free section and one labeled paid section are visible before any checkout or subscription confirmation step is reached.
tests.notes: Added to separate the screen placement requirement from the basic labeling check.

tests.scenario: Show subscription price and billing period with paid features
steps: Open the pricing screen
Locate the paid feature list
tests.expected_result: The same screen displays the subscription price and billing period together with the paid feature list.
tests.notes: Added to ensure the hybrid pricing requirement is directly testable.

tests.scenario: Do not require an extra screen to view price and billing period
steps: Open the pricing screen
Locate the paid feature list
Check whether the subscription price and billing period are visible without further navigation
tests.expected_result: The subscription price and billing period are visible on the same screen as the paid feature list without opening another screen.
tests.notes: Added to verify the no-additional-screen condition in the hybrid pricing requirement.

tests.scenario: Open an existing chat within the hybrid performance target
steps: Open an existing conversation on a supported device with normal network connectivity
Measure the time until the message list and text input become interactive
tests.expected_result: The message list and text input become interactive within 2 seconds.
tests.notes: Revised the automated reliability test to use the hybrid requirement's explicit response-time threshold.

tests.scenario: Accept user input within the hybrid performance target
steps: Open an existing conversation on a supported device with normal network connectivity
Measure the time until the text input accepts typing
tests.expected_result: The text input accepts user input within 2 seconds after the existing conversation is opened.
tests.notes: Added to verify the input-readiness condition separately from message-list visibility.

tests.scenario: Restore same-day conversation history after interruption
steps: Complete at least one message exchange in a conversation
Close the app, interrupt it, or send it to the background
Reopen the app on the same day
tests.expected_result: The previous messages from that conversation are displayed again after the app reopens.
tests.notes: Updated from the automated continuity test to match the hybrid restoration requirement.

tests.scenario: Restore same-day chat history after the app is sent to the background
steps: Complete at least one message exchange in a conversation
Send the app to the background without deleting app data
Reopen the app on the same day
tests.expected_result: The previous messages from that conversation are displayed again when the app is reopened on the same day.
tests.notes: Added to verify restoration behavior for a common interruption path.
